title: A Girl Who Seeks Death Waits for the Sea
overview: While facing profound depression, Hinako finds herself drawn to Shiori, a girl with eyes like the sea.

title: The Sunlit Beast and the Festival Song
overview: As Shiori integrates into Hinako's class, she finds herself at odds with Hinako's best friend Miko.

title: The Sea of Hope
overview: After a disastrous festival experience, Hinako tells Shiori about the tragedy in her past.

title: An Ephemeral Tie
overview: Unexpected revelations happen when Miko stumbles upon Shiori in the middle of a kill.

title: The Beast of Affection
overview: Miko reveals the truth behind her friendship with Hinako.

title: The Shape of Affection
overview: Hinako and Shiori work through the aftermath of Miko's revelation.

title: Kind People
overview: Unsettled by Hinako and Shiori's growing bond, Miko invites Hinako on a trip to help with the basketball team.

title: The Cause of the Cracks
overview: While accompanying the kindly older Ayame, Hinako faces an unexpected threat.

title: Said With a Prayer
overview: Shiori reveals to Miko the details of her distant and more recent past.

title: Cold Morning
overview: As Hinako seems to hit rock bottom, Miko and Shiori struggle to pull her back from the brink.

title: Beloved Child
overview: Shiori makes a desperate attempt to get her true feelings across to Hinako.

title: Warmth on the Sea Floor
overview: In the aftermath of Hinako's crisis, the girls feel out their new normal.
